_schema.description: Humanitarian funding pipeline by geographic region, FY 2024 (simulated). Three series — Requested, Received, Expenditure — grouped by region. Illustrates the funding gap and spending efficiency across response contexts.

fields.series: array of string, series keys in display order (left → right within each group)
fields.series_labels[key]: string, human-readable label for each series key
fields.series_colors[key]: string, hex color for each series — applied to bars and legend swatches
fields.data[].requested_m: number, funding requested in USD millions
fields.data[].received_m: number, funding received in USD millions
fields.data[].expenditure_m: number, actual expenditure in USD millions

_schema.replace: Add or remove entries in 'data[]' to change the groups. Add series keys to 'series', 'series_labels', 'series_colors', and each data record to add more bars per group. Keep series count ≤ 4 for readability. Values are in USD millions — adjust axis format string if your units differ.
